name: Ask a Question
summary: NL-to-SQL question answering with safety validation, conversation memory, and full audit logging.

name: Weekly Query Digest
summary: Weekly rollup of question activity + saved-query suggestions for recurring patterns.

name: Event Classification & Alert
summary: Real-time classification + enrichment + high-intent sales alerting per analytics event.

name: Pattern Escalation
summary: Sustained-interest escalation for accumulated medium signals above threshold.

name: New Variant Proposals
summary: Memory-filtered variant hypotheses for underperforming pages, human-gated deployment.

name: Decision Support
summary: On-demand weighted decision matrix with success metrics + kill criteria.

name: Optimization Proposals
summary: 5-8 weekly data-grounded optimization proposals with human accept/reject.

name: Combined CRO Report
summary: Weekly combined CRO briefing with in-flight table, significant results, and new proposals.

name: Weekly Report Distribution
summary: Combined messaging + knowledge base delivery of the weekly audit briefing.

name: Sales Alert
summary: Rich Hot+ lead alerts to messaging channel + On Fire rep DMs.

name: Daily Summary
summary: Weekday end-of-day enrichment metrics + top-3 prospects to messaging.

name: Alert & Outreach
summary: Real-time messaging alerts + email outreach on churn + expansion threshold events.

name: Payment Recovery Sequence
summary: 3-tier escalating dunning sequence with mid-sequence reversal handling.

name: Dunning Sequence
summary: 3-tier escalating dunning with mid-sequence reversal + cancellation handling.

name: Support Digest
summary: messaging summary of auto-resolved / escalated / auto-closed / still-stale counts with issue links.

name: Stale Issue Triage & Resolution
summary: Stale-issue classification + sentiment-routed auto-resolution, escalation, and abandoned-issue cleanup.

name: Issue Health Report
summary: Comprehensive report with resolution metrics, KB growth, and WoW trend analysis.

name: Failure Analysis
summary: CircleCI webhook → root-cause analysis → messaging formatted layout + recovery detection.

name: Flaky Test Digest
summary: Weekly flaky-test ranking with top offenders and trend context.

name: PR Comment Lifecycle
summary: Create-or-update the bot's single analysis comment on the associated PR, keyed by PR number.

name: Context Map Refresh
summary: Verify and refresh the codebase context map before scoring.

name: Dimension Scan
summary: Four-dimension scoring per context group with actionable idea creation.

name: Health Report
summary: Compose and deliver the combined monthly health report; append snapshot.

name: Linear Ticket Sync
summary: Update-or-create Linear ticket per changed component; priority mapped to change type.

name: messaging Handoff Summary
summary: Batched formatted messaging layout handoff summary with Linear + Figma links.

name: Figma Version Detection
summary: Version polling + component diff; emits change set for downstream UCs.

name: Backlog Scan
summary: Hourly codebase scan for backlog candidates; feeds uc_triage via events.

name: Implementation & PR Lifecycle
summary: End-to-end PR lifecycle from accepted item to merged PR, with webhook-driven review-comment reactions.

name: Release Management
summary: Release candidate bundling + human approval gate per user's release cadence.

name: Issue Synchronization
summary: source control issue ↔ Jira ticket sync with label-driven type/priority mapping.

name: Pull Request Lifecycle
summary: PR → Jira sync + messaging notification + oversized PR review gate.

name: Release Management
summary: source control release → Jira version + ticket fixVersion + messaging changelog.

name: Owner Notification + Commitment Tracking
summary: Per-owner email + commitment ledger + Critical escalation to manual_review.

name: Weekly messaging Digest
summary: Team-visible weekly digest of doc health.

name: Staleness Scan
summary: Per-space page scan + tier classification + link validation.

name: Experiment Results Analysis
summary: Winner detection + messaging summary + Linear rollout ticket.

name: Flag Change Monitoring
summary: Near-real-time flag change detection + messaging notification.

name: Stale Flag Digest
summary: Stale-flag digest with 30/60-day tiered escalation and running-experiment exclusion.
